name: Silk Guild Hall
unlockCondition: Textile Guild Master status or 22,000,000 ducats with Guild connections
calculationsAnalysis: The Silk Guild Hall represents specialized institutional infrastructure for Venice's prestigious textile industry. The construction cost of 12,000,000 ducats reflects the elegant architecture and specialized facilities required, while the income of 85,000 ducats (0.71% return) represents membership fees, quality certification charges, and pattern registration fees. The maintenance cost of 65,000 ducats (76.5% of income) creates a modest surplus appropriate for a non-profit institution. The employment capacity of 30 represents the administrative staff, quality inspectors, and design archivists. The construction time of 20 days (1728000000ms) reflects the specialized construction requirements. This building creates a strategic investment in textile industry governance with appropriate guild requirements reflecting the historical importance of quality control and design protection in Venice's luxury textile trade.
shortDescription: Headquarters of the Silk Guild governing the prestigious textile industry and fashion standards.
fullDescription: Regulating Venice's lucrative textile trade, the Silk Guild Hall administers this sophisticated industry from raw material import to finished luxury products. Featuring material testing facilities, pattern archives, quality control chambers, fashion design spaces, and international trade offices, this influential institution maintained Venice's reputation for textile excellence. Its regulation of everything from dye standards to weaving techniques ensured consistent quality in one of Venice's most profitable industries.
flavorText: The silk thread is delicate yet strong, simple yet refined—much like the regulations that govern our craft, which must be strict enough to ensure quality yet flexible enough to permit the innovation that keeps Venice at fashion's forefront.

locationRequirements.environmentalEffects: Creates fashion industry center, increases textile activity

constructionPhase3DPrompt: Renaissance Venetian Silk Guild Hall under construction, prestigious textile institution, material testing laboratory with specific light considerations, pattern archive with secure storage, quality testing chamber with precision equipment, fashion design studio with optimal lighting, grand meeting hall for guild masters, apprentice training area, international trade office focusing on Eastern silk sources, texture library with samples of various techniques, dyeing standards room with color references, elaborate facade with textile motifs and weaving symbols, isometric game perspective, stylized but detailed, focus on creating governance center for Venice's fashion and textile industry
completedBuilding3DPrompt: Completed Renaissance Venetian Silk Guild Hall, impressive textile institution featuring grand entrance with silk guild emblems, central hall displaying finest textile examples, material testing laboratory where experts evaluate raw silk quality, pattern archive containing centuries of designs in secure storage, quality control chamber where finished products are inspected and certified, fashion design studio where new styles are developed, training area where techniques are demonstrated and taught, color standards room with official dye samples, international trade office managing silk imports, historically accurate but slightly stylized for game aesthetic, isometric game perspective, sense of textile expertise and fashion governance, guild officials in quality garments, artisans demonstrating techniques, merchants examining certified products, atmosphere of artistic creativity balanced with technical precision, perfect expression of Venice's reputation for textile excellence

soundDesign.ambientSound: Fabric handling, quality discussions, fashion consultations
soundDesign.activitySounds: Textile demonstrations, standard setting debates, material testing
